$schema: Per-character animation manifest. Each entry consumes the processed 128x60 character sheet at native resolution (5 rows × 4 cols, each cell 32x12 native — character footprint 16x24 within an oversized cell with 8 px of padding either side and the action row at the bottom 12 px). All characters use the same sheet shape (see art/style.json -> character_full_v3_upscaled).

sheet_shape.$cell_layout_comment: 5 rows × 4 cols. Each row is 12 px tall; each cell is 32 px wide. The character occupies the central 16 px of width and the full 12 px of height (anchored bottom-center, feet at y=11 within the frame). In sheet coords: cell.x = col * 32, frame.x = cell.x + 8, cell.y = frame.y = row * 12.
